#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Augment Settings Setup Script
# Sets up machine-specific configuration after cloning ~/.augment

AUGMENT_DIR="${HOME}/.augment"
SETTINGS_TEMPLATE="${AUGMENT_DIR}/settings.json.template"
SETTINGS_FILE="${AUGMENT_DIR}/settings.json"

echo "🔧 Augment Settings Setup"
echo "=========================="
echo

# Check if already set up
if [ -f "$SETTINGS_FILE" ]; then
    echo "⚠️  settings.json already exists"
    read -p "Overwrite? (y/N): " -n 1 -r
    echo
    if [[ ! $REPLY =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
        echo "Keeping existing settings.json"
        exit 0
    fi
fi

# Copy template
if [ ! -f "$SETTINGS_TEMPLATE" ]; then
    echo "❌ Error: settings.json.template not found"
    exit 1
fi

echo "📋 Creating settings.json from template..."
cp "$SETTINGS_TEMPLATE" "$SETTINGS_FILE"

# Prompt for indexing directories
echo
echo "📂 Configure indexing directories (for codebase-retrieval)"
echo "   Enter paths to your project directories, one per line."
echo "   Press Enter on empty line when done."
echo

DIRS=()
while true; do
    read -p "Directory path (or Enter to finish): " dir
    if [ -z "$dir" ]; then
        break
    fi
    
    # Expand ~ to home directory
    dir="${dir/#\~/$HOME}"
    
    if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
        DIRS+=("$dir")
        echo "   ✓ Added: $dir"
    else
        echo "   ⚠️  Directory doesn't exist, skipped: $dir"
    fi
done

# Update settings.json with actual directories
if [ ${#DIRS[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
    # Build JSON array
    JSON_DIRS=$(printf ',"%s"' "${DIRS[@]}")
    JSON_DIRS="[${JSON_DIRS:1}]"
    
    # Replace placeholder with actual dirs using Python for safe JSON manipulation
    python3 -c "
import json, sys
with open('$SETTINGS_FILE', 'r') as f:
    settings = json.load(f)
settings['indexingAllowDirs'] = json.loads('$JSON_DIRS')
with open('$SETTINGS_FILE', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(settings, f, indent=2)
"
    echo
    echo "✅ Settings configured with ${#DIRS[@]} directory(s)"
else
    echo
    echo "⚠️  No directories configured. You can edit settings.json manually later."
fi

echo
echo "✅ Setup complete!"
echo
echo "📝 Next steps:"
echo "   1. Review: cat $SETTINGS_FILE"
echo "   2. Edit manually if needed: vim $SETTINGS_FILE"
echo "   3. Install marketplace plugins: see INSTALL.md or CATALOG.md"
echo
